category_sources: Official Ruby homepage describes Ruby as a programming language and official docs provide language documentation.
source_facts.description says Ruby is a scripting language.
display_name_sources: Official Ruby homepage and documentation use Ruby.
docs_sources: Official Ruby documentation page links docs.ruby-lang.org and versioned official API documentation.
source_facts.version is 4.0.5, so docs.ruby-lang.org/en/4.0 is the matching major-version documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official ruby/ruby README gives the clone URL https://github.com/ruby/ruby.git.
source_facts.repo is empty; official Ruby GitHub organization is verified and pins ruby/ruby as The Ruby Programming Language.
tags_sources: Official ruby/ruby README describes Ruby as an interpreted object-oriented programming language.
source_facts.description identifies Ruby as an object-oriented scripting language.
